reviews.author: christofac
reviews.title: Awful bank
reviews.content: Monzo is suppose to be better than other banks but it’s worse! They sell this story but are awful! Monzo is rubbish anytime you try and use your own money you block payments so we can’t pay bills. Bills get paid late and we incur charges. You’ve already cost us over £1,000 and your reporting system is useless! Their app blocks payments all the time and can take sometimes weeks to use your own money. Their appeal and after customer service is awful too.

reviews.title: Best bank

reviews.author: scoobiesnoop
reviews.title: Easy banking done right
reviews.content: Monzo is quite possibly the best bank I’ve used. There’s no complicated systems in place, you can access you money instantly, pay bills via DD’s, set up “pots” so you can separate money for certain things, which is super handy. It’s online which means you can literally do every thing on your phone for added ease and you money is protected with the usual insurances you’d expect from any major bank. I can’t recommend Monzo enough.

reviews.author: Hiitsmelp
reviews.title: DONT USE THIS BANK
reviews.content: Will not help u with fraud like a normal bank do not trust monzo at all use a proper bank. I have lost money to fraud and they won’t help me a normal bank for example my other bank NatWest has always helped me in the past its a disgusting company using ur information and selling it.

reviews.author: lordkovalchuk
reviews.title: BEST BANK IN UK
reviews.content: It’s the best bank in UK. ALSOLUTELY FANTASTIC AND FIRST OF ALL FAST AND EASY. Fast and easy are qualities not heard or seen in other UK banks. Also the support is very human and understanding. Had a problem with a fraud transaction once and it literally took one second to get it approved. While on other banks it would take a lot of time and I would have to provide piles of documents and proof. Also creating pots and different card connected to them is absolutely top feature. Where you can create separate pots for different spending purposes . Very good for tracking money

reviews.title: Avoid Monzo at all costs .
reviews.content:
Completely unsafe. My money was taken, I provided full proof, and their response was: “We cannot reverse your money.”
Same thing happened to my friend before—now I know it’s not a coincidence.
Your money is not secure here, and if anything goes wrong, you’re on your own.
Closing my account and telling everyone I know to do the same.

They say they will “shout” about new app features but don’t count on it!

insights.summary: Users frequently report issues related to account closures and blocking access to funds, poor customer support especially in fraud cases, and app performance problems including crashes and sluggishness.

examples: account was closed and blocked without reason
blocked payments causing late bills and charges
accounts frozen without reason leaving no access to money
topProblems.name: Account closures and blocked access

examples: won't help with fraud or refund losses
support not responding to login or issue reports
topProblems.name: Poor customer support and fraud handling

examples: sluggish app taking multiple taps to respond
topProblems.name: App performance issues
